critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_008 (Multi-round, Run 2)

1. CAH OOD: No CAH validation data.
2. ALERT FATIGUE: >60% dismiss rate documented.
3. WORKFLOW ACTIONABILITY: Sepsis bundle may not be executable at CAHs.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_008 (Multi-round, Run 2 — receives Critic output)

All three conceded. Network-wide contract should be phased.

debate_rounds.critic_move: PROPOSE EMPIRICAL TEST: 90-day CAH pilot measuring actionability rate and time-to-bundle.

empirical_test.condition: 90-day pilot at one CAH measuring actionability rate and time-to-sepsis-bundle initiation.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Actionability rate < 30% or no reduction in time-to-bundle.
